dashboard.donor.subtitle: Xarunta amarka portfolio-gaaga — AI-gu wuxuu soo bandhigayaa waxa maanta dareen u baahan.
dashboard.ngo.all_caught_up: Waxaad gaadhay heer wanaagsan! Hawl degdeg ah ma jirto hadda.
dashboard.ngo.documents_uploaded: Dukumiintiyada muhiimka ah waa la soo geliyey
dashboard.ngo.subtitle: Bordhada diyaargarowga — laguu hagayo codsigaaga xiga ee guul leh.
dashboard.ngo.upcoming_tasks_subtitle: Wakhtiyada soo socda iyo hawlaha tallaabada
dashboard.reviewer.ready_subtitle: Bilow inaad dhibco siiso codsiyada laguu xilsaaray si aad u caawiso isku-dhejinta NGO-yada deeqaha saxda ah.
dashboard.reviewer.ready_to_review: Diyaar ma u tahay dib u eegista?
dashboard.reviewer.subtitle: Safka dib u eegistaada — AI-gu hormarsaday oo diyaar u ah isbarbardhigga.
report.ai_guidance_subtitle: Hel jawaab AI ah qaybta warbixintaada
report.calendar_subtitle: Dulmar muuqaal ah oo wakhtiyada warbixinta soo socda
report.no_deadlines_this_month: Wakhtiyo dhammaad ah bishan ma jiraan
report.no_reports_hint: Warbixinnada way muuqan doonaan marka aad hesho deeqo la bixiyay oo leh shuruudo warbixin.
report.no_upcoming_deadlines: Wakhtiyo dhammaad ah oo soo socda ma jiraan
copilot.all_clear_no_actions: Wax walba waa fiicantahay — ma jiraan tallaabooyin la soo jeediyay hadda.
copilot.ask_intro: Co-pilot wuxuu ku saleeyaa jawaab kasta deeqahaaga, codsiyadaada iyo siyaasadahaaga dhabta ah — oo leh tixraacyo.
chart.ai_caption_unavailable: Faallooyinka AI lama heli karo — xogta jaantuska ayaa kor ku qoran.
tour.donor.s1.title: Xarunta amarka portfolio-gaaga
tour.donor.s1.body: Xukunka maanta wuxuu isku duubaa 3-5 arrimood oo u baahan dareenkaaga toddobaadkan — laga soo qaaday AI iyada oo ku saleysan deeqahaaga, codsiyadaada iyo astaamaha khatarta dhabta ah.
tour.donor.s2.title: Jaantusyo leh faallooyinka AI
tour.donor.s2.body: Jaantus walba wuxuu leeyahay faallo "sidaas darteed" oo ay qortay AI. Eeg dashboard 10 ilbiriqsi, ma aha 10 daqiiqo.
tour.donor.s3.title: Co-pilot mar walba waa hal taabasho oo kale
tour.donor.s3.body: Ku taabo dhalaalka cidhifka midig wakhti kasta. Weydii Co-pilot caafimaadka portfolio, qor RFP cusub, ama raadi qaababka codsiyada la diiday.
tour.donor.s4.title: Naqshadeyso deeqaha AI
tour.donor.s4.body: "Samee deeq" hoosteeda, Kuja waxay soo jeedisaa shuruudaha u-qalmidda, miisaanka qiimeynta iyo shuruudaha warbixinta oo la jaanqaaday yoolkaaga, mawduuca iyo juqraafiga.
tour.ngo.s1.title: Dhibcaha diyaargarowga
tour.ngo.s1.body: Calaamad 0-100 oo muujinaysa sida codsigaaga xiga loo arko inuu yahay tartame. AI ayaa cusboonaysiisa marka dukumiintigaaga, codsiyadaada iyo awoodaada is bedelaan.
tour.ngo.s2.title: Tallaabooyinka xiga ee AI ay tababartay
tour.ngo.s2.body: Saddexda tallaabo halkan ah waxaa loo kala saaray saamaynta dhibcaha diyaargarowga — oo leh kor u qaadid la qiyaasay tallaabo kasta.
tour.ngo.s3.title: Eeg deeqaha si caqli leh
tour.ngo.s3.body: Deeq kasta waxay muujisaa ku habboonaanta AI ay qiyaastay + suurtagalka guulaysiga + waxa ka maqan profile-kaaga. Ku diirsho meesha aad ku guulaysan doonto.
tour.ngo.s4.title: Co-pilot adigu wuu ku la qoraa
tour.ngo.s4.body: Ma ku jirtaa qayb? Ku taabo dhalaalka. Co-pilot wuxuu ku saleeyaa talo kasta codsiyadaadii hore — marna ma ahan guud.
tour.reviewer.s1.title: Saf AI-gu hormarsaday
tour.reviewer.s1.body: Hawlaha laguu xilsaaray waxaa loo kala saaray mudnaanta dib u eegista — mararka u dambeeya, adkaanta iyo u-eegga codsiyada hore ee dhibcaha sare.
tour.reviewer.s2.title: Habka isbarbardhigga
tour.reviewer.s2.body: Doori 2-5 codsi si aad u barbar dhigto. AI waxay isku xirtaa awoodaha, daciifnimadaada iyo waxay calaamadiyaa codsiyo isugu jira oo laga shakisan yahay.
tour.reviewer.s3.title: Caddee dhibci kasta
tour.reviewer.s3.body: AI waxay hore u buuxisaa sababaha shuruud kasta oo qiimeyn ah iyada oo isticmaalaysa waxa ku jira codsiga. Adigu waad tafatirtaa oo waad xaqiijisaa — aad uga dhakhso badan qoraal cusub.
tour.admin.s1.title: Hawl-gallada hal jeer
tour.admin.s1.body: Mowjadda dhibaatooyinka waxay calaamadisaa qaababka aan caadiga ahayn — kororka codsiyada la diiday, safafka dib-u-eegista oo gaabin, natiijooyinka xaqiijinta oo laga shakisan yahay.
tour.admin.s2.title: Bordhada caafimaadka AI tooska ah
tour.admin.s2.body: Wac kasta oo AI ah ee madasha way diiwaan gashan yahay — qiimaha guusha, tokens, kala qaybinta endpoint kasta. Kashif dib-u-noqoshooyinka kahor isticmaalayaasha.
tour.admin.s3.title: Habee oo kalsoonow
tour.admin.s3.body: Bordhada kalsoonida hoggaaminta, jadwalada hubinta, xaqiijin lagu qoray hawlaha burburinta — kani waa madasha guddi maamulku ku kalsoonaan karo inuu maaraysto sanduuq.
report.precheck_subtitle: Aan eegno qabyada kahor inta aanan gudbin shuruudaha bixiyaha — way ka fiicantahay in la xalliyo daldaloolada hadda halkii aad heli lahayd codsi dib u eegis ah goor dambe.
report.precheck_no_requirements: Ma jiraan shuruudo gaar ah oo bixiye — AI wuxuu isticmaalay miisaan guud.
report.precheck_gaps: Halka aad ku darin karto wax
report.precheck_failed: Falanqaynta AI lama heli karo wakhtigan.
report.precheck_run_again: Mar kale orodhi dib u eegista
apply.proposal_subtitle: Sheekadaada u sheeg shuruud kasta. Qoraaga la-shaqeeyaha ee AI halkan ayuu joogaa marka aad caawimaad u baahan tahay — qoritaan cusub ama hagaajinta waxa aad qortay.

verification.no_recommendations: Ma jiraan talooyin la heli karo.

grant.no_match_hint: Isku day inaad hagaajiso raadintaada ama tirtirto shaandhada.

review.detail.scores_recorded: Dib u eegistaada si guul leh ayaa loo diiwaangeliyay.
review.detail.no_responses: Ma jiraan jawaabo loo heli karo codsigan.
review.detail.no_documents: Codsigan dukumiinti loo ma soo gelin.
review.detail.score_intro: Sii dhibco shuruud kasta hoos ku qoran (0-100). Wadarta culayska leh ayaa si toos ah u cusboonaysiisa.
review.detail.ai_reference: Tixraac AI ayaa la heli karaa
apply.submitted_message: Codsigaaga waxaa loo gudbiyay dib u eegis.
apply.eligibility_subtitle: Xaqiiji in hay'addaadu buuxiso shuruud kasta
apply.profile_imported: Xogta astaanta waa la soo geliyay. Dib u eeg oo xaqiiji nuxur kasta oo hoose.
apply.documents_subtitle: Soo geli dukumiintiyada loo baahan yahay codsigaaga
apply.click_to_upload: Riix si aad u soo geliso
apply.upload_constraints: PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX ilaa 10MB
apply.review_subtitle: Hubi in wax walba ay sax yihiin ka hor inta aadan gudbin
apply.no_doc_required: Dukumiinti looma baahna. Sii wad dib u eegista.
apply.no_eligibility: Ma jiraan shuruudo u-qalmid oo gaar ah
apply.no_proposal_criteria: Lama qeexin shuruudo soo jeedin. Sii wad tallaabada xigta.
header.lang_footer: Jawaabaha AI waxay isticmaalaan luqadda aad doorato.
observability.title: Kormeerista AI
observability.subtitle: Caafimaad, xawaare, daahid, iyo xaaladaha aan caadiga ahayn ee endpoint kasta
observability.anomalies_none: Ma jirto xaaladaha aan caadi ahayn 24-kii saacadood ee tegay.
observability.no_errors: Ma jiraan khaladaad la duubay 24-kii saacadood ee tegay.
observability.no_users: Ma jirto hawl AI 24-kii saacadood ee tegay.
glossary.readiness_score: Dhibco 0-100 ah oo muujinaya sida codsigaaga deeqda ee xiga loo arko inuu yahay tartame. Cusboonaysiinta tooska ah marka dukumiintigaaga, codsiyada, iyo awoodaada is bedelaan.
glossary.capacity_assessment: Qiimeyn nafteed oo qaab dhismeed ah oo isticmaalaysa hannaan la aqoonsan yahay (Kuja, STEP, UN-HACT, CHS, NUPAS) oo qiimeysa ururkaaga awoodda, maamulka, maaliyada, iyo barnaamijyada. Bixiyayaasha way tixgeliyaan markay codsiyada eegayaan.
glossary.eligibility: Shuruudaha ururkaagu ay tahay inuu buuxiyo ka hor inta aanad codsan — dalka, qaybta, diiwaangelinta, cabbirka miisaaniyada, iwm. Bixiyaha ayaa dejiya.
glossary.rubric: Hannaanka qiimeynta ee ay isticmaalaan dib u eegayaasha. Shuruud kasta waxaa leh miisaan; wadarta miisaaminta waxay noqotaa dhibcaha codsigaaga.
glossary.compliance: Hubin joogto ah: baaritaanka cunaqabataynta (UN/OFAC/EU), xaqiijinta diiwaanka dawladda, iyo xaaladda warbixinta deeqda. Bixiyayaasha waxay arkaan jawi cagaaran/hurdi/cas qof kasta oo helay deeqda.
assessment.results.headline_excellent: Waxaad u tartansan tahay deeqo waaweyn
assessment.results.headline_good: Waxaad diyaar u tahay inaad codsato si kalsoonida ah
assessment.results.headline_starting: Aan wada qabano aasaaska muhiimka ah
assessment.results.subhead_excellent: Awooddaadu waxay ku jirtaa heerka ugu sarreeya. Ka codso deeqo waaweyn oo sannado badan oo hogaami isbaheysiga.
assessment.results.subhead_good: Waxaad u tartansan tahay inta badan deeqaha. Diirad saar meelaha tabarta yar.
assessment.results.subhead_developing: Waxaad buuxinaysaa aasaaska. Xoojiyo cabbiraha tabarta yar.
assessment.results.subhead_starting: NGO kasta oo xooggan halkan ayey ka bilaabantay. Tallaabooyinka hoose waxay leeyihiin saamaynta ugu badan.
assessment.results.unlocks_excellent: Deeqo barnaamijyo sannado badan · Hogaaminta isbaheysiga · Doorarka qandaraasleha
assessment.results.unlocks_good: Deeqo sanadle · Deeqo hoosaad · Wicitaanno mowduuc
assessment.results.unlocks_developing: Deeqo tijaabo · Barnaamijyo deeqo yaryar · Dhisidda awoodda
assessment.results.unlocks_starting: Deeqo dhisidda awoodda · Iskaashi waano · Deeqo abuur
assessment.results.next_steps: Tallaabooyinka xiga ee la soo jeediyay
applications.detail.summary_subtitle_sub: La gudbiyay, sugaya in la siiyo dib u eege.
applications.detail.summary_subtitle_sco: Dhibco la siiyay — sugaya go'aanka maaliyadeed.
applications.detail.summary_subtitle_awa: La bixiyay — heshiis deeqda ayaa la soo saaray.
org.profile_completion_subtitle: Profile dhammaystiran ayaa ka dhigaya talooyinka AI kuwo sax ah iyo codsiyadaada kuwo xoog leh.
org.complete_profile_cta: Buuxi meelaha hoose si aad ugu gaarto 100%
verification.intro_body: Cagaaran: diiwaanku wuxuu xaqiijiyay oo waa la kalsoonaan karaa. Hurdi: AI ayaa falanqeeyay si kalsooni sare leh — bini'aadam waa inuu xaqiijiyo. Cas: la calaamadeeyay ama lama xaqiijin — dib u eeg ka hor sii wadidda.
glossary.application_status: Halka codsigan ku yaal tubada bixiyaha. Qabyad = lama gudbin; La gudbiyay = sugaya in la siiyo; Dib u eegis hoos timaadda; Dhibco la siiyay = sugaya go'aanka; La bixiyay/La diiday = ugu dambeeya.
framework.kuja.label: Hannaanka Kuja
framework.kuja.description: Qiimaynta caadiga ah ee awoodda Kuja Link oo daboolaysa 5 qaybood oo muhiim ah oo ururka.
framework.step.label: Hannaanka STEP
framework.step.description: Qiimaynta Strengthening Effective Partner Engagement and Performance oo ay isticmaalaan NGO-yada waaweyn ee caalamiga ah.
framework.un_hact.label: UN-HACT
framework.un_hact.description: Qiimayn yar ee UN Harmonized Approach to Cash Transfers ee la-shaqeeyayaasha hirgelinta.
framework.chs.label: CHS (Heerka Bani'aadannimo ee Aasaasiga ah)
framework.chs.description: Qiimayn nafteed ee Heerka Bani'aadannimo ee Aasaasiga ah ee Tayada iyo Mas'uuliyadda.
framework.nupas.label: NUPAS
framework.nupas.description: Nidaamka Qiimaynta Waxqabadka Mid Ah ee Ururada Aan Faa'iido lahayn ee qiimaynta ururka oo dhamaystiran.
doc_type.registration.label: Shahaadada diiwaangelinta
doc_type.registration.description: Dukumeenti rasmi ah oo diiwaangelin ah oo ka soo baxay dawladda
doc_type.financial.label: Bayaannada maaliyadeed
doc_type.financial.description: Bayaannada maaliyadeed ee la hubiyay ee ugu dambeeyay
doc_type.audit.label: Warbixinta hubinta
doc_type.audit.description: Warbixinta hubinta dibadda (2 sano ee la soo dhaafay)
doc_type.psea.label: Siyaasadda PSEA
doc_type.psea.description: Siyaasadda Ka-ilaalinta Faafinta iyo Xadgudubka Galmoodka
assessment.no_checklist_items: Ma jiraan wax la hubin karo hannankan
review.completed.subtitle: Dib u eegista aad gudbisay. Sugaya go'aanada bixiyaha ilaa la xaqiijiyo deeqaha.
compliance.recommended_action_body: Fur safafka deeqaha hoose — bilow waxyaabaha wakhtigoodu dhaafay ({overdue}), kadibna kuwa khatarta ku jira ({atRisk}). Wada hadal degdeg ah oo lala yeesho deeq-helaha ayaa inta badan xalliya arrinta.
compliance_copilot.title: Kaaliyaha hoggaaminta
compliance_copilot.intro: Hel akhri af cad oo ku saabsan natiijooyinka xaqiijinta + cunaqabataynta ee ururkan, oo ay weheliso tallaabooyin la-socoshada gaar ah.
donor.scaffold.burden_explainer: Wakhtiga + adkaanta la qiyaasey ee NGO inay codsato. Culays yar wuxuu soo jiidaa codsade badan oo wuxuu yareeyaa codsiyo aan dhammaystirnayn.
grant.wizard.ai_extracting: Waxaa la soo saarayaa shuruudaha, KPI-yada, iyo jadwalka warbixinta
grant.wizard.doc_analyzed: Dukumeentiga si guul leh ayaa loo falanqeeyay
grant.wizard.basics_prefilled: Goobaha hoose waxaa horay loogu buuxiyay dukumeentigaagii. Dib u eeg oo hagaaji haddii loo baahdo.
grant.wizard.eligibility_intro: Daar qaybaha xaq u yeelashada aad rabto in codsadayaashu buuxiyaan. Ku dar faahfaahin oo dejiso miisaanka.
grant.wizard.eligibility_prefilled: Qaar ka mid ah shuruudaha waxaa horay loogu buuxiyay dukumeentigaagii.
grant.wizard.evaluation_intro: Sharax cabbirrada uu eegaa eegayaal isticmaali doonaan si ay u qiimeeyaan codsiyada.
grant.wizard.description_placeholder: Waxa ay codsadayaashu khusayso inay ka hadlaan…
grant.wizard.docs_intro: Dooro dukumeentiyada ay codsadayaashu waa inay soo dejiyaan. Guji kaarka si aad u shidato, ka dibna ku dar shuruudaha gaarka ah.
grant.wizard.doc_required_label: Lagama maarmaan (codsaduhu waa inuu soo dejiyo)
grant.wizard.review_intro: Eeg deeqdaada ka hor inta aadan daabicin
grant.wizard.required_fields_missing: Goobaha loo baahan yahay way maqan yihiin:
grant.wizard.missing.title: Cinwaan
grant.wizard.go_back_to_basics: Ku noqo Macluumaadka aasaasiga (Tallaabada 2) si aad u dhammaystirto ka hor daabacaadda.
grant.wizard.publish_subtitle: Deeqdaada waxay isla markiiba u muuqan doontaa NGO-yada u dhigma
review.subtitle_queue: Safka mudnaanta AI leh oo leh isbarbar dhig
review.no_pending_body: Ma haysatid codsiyo hadda ah oo aad eegtid.
review.no_completed_body: Eegisyada aad dhammeyso ayaa halkan ka muuqan doona.
review.no_apps_donor_body: Codsiyadu waxay halkan ka muuqan doonaan marka NGO-yadu gudbiyaan.
review.completed.empty_body: Eegisyada aad dhammeyso waxaa halkan lagu liisan doonaa tixraac.
applications.documents_empty: Dukumeentiyada lala soo dhejiyey codsigan ayaa halkan ka muuqan doona
applications.reviews_empty: Buundooyinka iyo faallooyinka eegayaasha ayaa halkan ka muuqan doona
applications.scores_empty: Buundooyinku waxay muuqan doonaan ka dib qiimeynta AI iyo eegista
server.error.auth.admin_only: Waxaa loo baahan yahay xulnoolaha maamulka.
server.error.auth.access_denied: Ma haysatid ogolaansho aad tan u sameyso.
server.error.auth.too_many_attempts: Isku-day badan oo gelitaan. Fadlan sug daqiiqado yar oo isku day mar kale.
server.error.auth.account_locked: Akoonkii waa la xidhay. Isku day daqiiqado yar ka dib.
server.error.auth.invalid_credentials: Iimaylka ama erayga sirta ah waa khalad.
server.error.grant.deadline_passed: Wakhtigii ugu dambeeyay ee codsiga waa dhaafay.
server.error.grant.already_applied: Ururkaagu hore ayuu deeqdan u codsaday.
server.error.upload.no_file: Ma jiro fayl la soo dhejiyay.
server.error.upload.empty_file: Faylku waa madhan yahay ama aad ayuu u yaryahay.
server.error.upload.too_large: Faylka aad ayuu u weyn yahay. Cabbirka ugu badan: {max_mb} MB.
server.error.upload.unsupported_type: Nooca faylka lama taageero ({ext}). Kuwa la oggol yahay: {allowed}.
server.error.upload.pdf_no_pages: PDF-ku ma laha bogag. Soo dhejii PDF sax ah.
server.error.upload.pdf_unreadable: Lama akhriyi karo faylka PDF. Wuxuu noqon karaa mid khasaaray ama lacag-sirta leh.
server.error.upload.docx_unreadable: Lama akhriyi karo dukumeentiga Word. Wuxuu noqon karaa mid khasaaray.
server.error.upload.no_text: Lama helin qoraal la akhriyi karo. Dukumeentigu waa madhan yahay ama waa la sawiray.
server.error.ai.unavailable: AI hadda lama heli karo. Fadlan isku day daqiiqado yar ka dib.
server.error.ai.rate_limited: Codsiyo AI ah oo aad u badan. Sug daqiiqad yar.
server.error.ai.invalid_input: Codsiga AI-da waxaa ka maqan macluumaad la rabo.
coauthor.heading: Wada-qoraha AI
coauthor.subtitle: Ku qor warbixin gaaban luuqad kasta. Waxaan isticmaali doonnaa sumadda ururkaaga, codsiyada hore, iyo dukumeentiyada la soo dhejiyay si aan u soo saarno qabyo koowaad oo dhammeystiran. Wax kasta wax ka beddel ka hor inta aadan gudbin.
coauthor.brief_placeholder: Tusaale: waxaan diiradda saareynaa beeralayda yaryar ee haweenku hoggaaminayaan ee Kakamega iyadoo la adeegsanayo tababar SMS ah, oo lagu salaynayo barnaamijkayaga galleyda 2024.
coauthor.applied_to_form: Waxaa loo dabaqay foomkaaga — eeg oo wax ka beddel
coauthor.preview_only: Horudhac kaliya — bilow codsi si aad u dabajiso
grant_brief.cta.open: Ama naqshadee adigoo isticmaalaya AI iyo warbixin
grant_brief.heading: Naqshadee adoo isticmaalaya warbixin
grant_brief.subtitle: Qor 1-2 jumlado oo ku saabsan cidda aad rabto inaad maalgeliso iyo natiijada aad rabto. AI-gu wuxuu naqshadeyn doonaa qabyo dhammeystiran — cinwaan, sharraxaad, cabbirrada miisaaman, xaq u yeelashada, dukumeentiyada, jadwalka warbixinta, wakhtiga ugu dambeeya. Wax ka beddel ka hor daabacaadda.
grant_brief.placeholder: Tusaale: $500k oo loogu talagalay isbeddelka cimilada ee dumarka ee xeebta Kenya, diiradda saaray dhirta beeralayda yaryar, 18 bilood
grant_brief.toast.applied: Deeqda waa la naqshadeeyay: cabbirro {criteria} · eeg oo wax ka beddel
ai.confidence.high.tooltip: Sare — sheegashada waxaa toos u taageeraysa il magacaaban oo aan ku tusi karno.
ai.confidence.medium.tooltip: Dhexdhexaad — sheegashada waa macquul ku saleysan ilahaaga, laakiin hubi faahfaahinta.
ai.confidence.low.tooltip: Hoose — sheegasho guud ama qiyaaso; hubi ka hor inta aadan gudbin.
provenance.empty: Ma jiraan tixraac ilo ah oo qaybtan loo diiwaangeliyay.
matches.heading: Deeqaha ugu wanaagsan adiga
matches.subtitle: Deeqaha furan oo loo kala saaray itimaalka aad ku guulaysan karto
matches.empty.title: Wali ma jiraan deeqo ku habboon
matches.empty.body: Waxaan halkan ku tusi doonaa deeqaha la kala saaray markii aan kuu qiimeyno liiska deeqaha furan.
